data.name: Symphony of Delights
data.detailed_description:
Morpheus's daughter stole the keys that open portals between the realms of existence. Faced with the threat of demiurges, she will fight to save the free will of dreamers. She will give herself completely in this quest, completely! With lust and strength!

Features:
- Sprites animations frame by frame.
- Fully hand-drawn. Techniques: Acrylics, watercolors and rough pastels.
- Optional side stories.
- Fun battle system based on wise decisions.
- Nearby checkpoints.
- Different ways.
- Wise decisions.
- No tasks to unlock. Just follow your story. No farming.
- Achievements.
- Filled with lust scenes.
- Simple, easy and intuitive user interface.

Coming soon:
Translations into Chinese, Portuguese, Russian and other languages.
MAC and Linux version.

There are still many mysteries to be revealed!

data.short_description: Elylah, the princess of the dream world returns to her homeland with a new question: Why don't dreamers praise her anymore? She will embark on a quest for the truth beyond the ancient portals. An erotic visual novel based on wise choices with a battle system in a fantastic swashbuckler´s world.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Celeron 847 Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 9200
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Intel Celeron 847 Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 9200
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Intel Celeron 847 Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce 9200
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
